description: Shipped production features across three client platforms serving 13,000+ active users, driving measurable gains in file reliability, search performance, API response times, and AI-powered workflow automation.
highlights: Eliminated 100% of file duplication failures across upload, move, and delete operations by implementing metadata validations within Firestore transactions
Reduced file search latency to 0.4ms by integrating Algolia with custom Firestore indexes, enabling instant cross-space file discovery for 3,000+ users
Built a multi-agent chat system for generating, reviewing, and version-controlling executable certification scripts with support for dynamic modifications and predefined templates
Cut AI certification script generation time by 60% (5 min → 2 min) by implementing PostgreSQL indexing across device family models
Reduced therapy scheduling API response time from 3s to 0.5s via optimized dynamic routing in Next.js, improving reliability for 10,000+ users
Implemented anonymous track submission flow with approval-gated private inbox access controls, improving upload accessibility for platform contributors

description: Enhanced a TypeScript-native serverless platform by extending the code editor with type-safety tooling, modernizing the design system, and shipping OAuth integrations that expanded the platform's automation capabilities.
highlights: Reduced Applet file load times by 62.5% (2s → 0.75s) by adopting SSR preloading for critical assets, significantly improving user experience
Extended the code editor with cross-file TypeScript linting and Prettier integration via a custom Language Server Protocol, enabling fully type-safe and error-free development
Migrated the design system from Chakra-UI to Tailwind CSS and CSS Modules, increasing UI flexibility and reducing legacy dependencies
Implemented OAuth integrations for Spotify, Linear, Discord, and Notion via a custom Better-auth module, unlocking new automation capabilities across the platform
Built a demo Applet library on Deno Land's serverless infrastructure, showcasing full platform integration use cases to prospective users

projects.name: Zipper
projects.description: TypeScript-native serverless platform for building internal tools and automations

description: Led frontend development of a Web3 NFT game from zero to 10,000+ active users on the WAX blockchain, building the design system, state architecture, and build infrastructure from the ground up.
highlights: Led end-to-end development of Zombies Outbreak Survival, scaling the Web3 NFT game to 10,000+ active users on the WAX blockchain
Reduced WAX-chain asset load times by 80% (5s → 1s) by implementing a local-first caching strategy using IndexedDB
Designed and built a reusable React component library and scalable design system, streamlining development workflows across multiple concurrent projects
Optimized bundle size and build performance by authoring a custom Webpack configuration tailored to the gaming environment
Architected a monorepo with Yarn Workspaces and TurboRepo, improving cross-package dependency management and overall developer velocity

description: Built and launched two Web3 NFT games on the WAX blockchain, collectively reaching 8,000+ active users, while creating internal tooling that accelerated the company's blockchain portfolio.
highlights: Led frontend development for 2 Web3 NFT games — Oliveland (3,000+ MAUs) and Beast Garden (5,000+ MAUs) — delivering wallet-based transactions, asset rendering, and gameplay mechanics on WAX blockchain
Built internal utility libraries that reduced delivery time across multiple concurrent Web3 game initiatives
Developed scalable TypeScript and React codebases integrated with WAX smart contracts to support fast-growing user bases

description: Designed and developed SISVENDA, a web-based ERP system adopted by 100+ local businesses, independently owning the full product lifecycle from UI/UX design to backend integration and authentication.
highlights: Developed SISVENDA, a full-featured web ERP system now adopted by 100+ local businesses, using React.js and Ant Design
Reduced page load time by 75% (2s → 0.5s) through caching strategies, code minification, React Query, and responsive design optimizations
Integrated OAuth2 and JWT-based authentication to enforce secure user access and data protection across the platform
Independently designed the full UI/UX prototype, enabling rapid product iteration without a dedicated design team
Maintained backward compatibility with legacy C#/.NET APIs by coordinating integration touchpoints with backend developers, ensuring seamless frontend-backend communication
